resultList.dtldesc: Discover the perfect blend of elegance and modern living with this exquisite 3 BHK builder floor, now available for sale in the highly desirable Sector 28, Dwarka, New Delhi. Located just 300 meters from the renowned Dwarka Expressway, this home offers both luxury and convenience in one of the city's most sought-after locations.::::Property Specifications ::::This semi-furnished 3rd-floor apartment is part of a well-maintained 4-story building, offering a harmonious balance of style and functionality. With a spacious super area of 125 square yards and a generous carpet area of 110 square yards, the home provides an ideal layout for those looking to create their own personal sanctuary.::::The apartment features three elegantly designed bedrooms, each providing privacy and comfort. The apartment includes separate living and dining areas, a modular kitchen with a chimney, and an attached utility area for added practicality. The ceramic tile flooring throughout enhances the overall sophistication of the space. With Vastu compliance and an east-facing orientation, this home ensures a balanced and positive living environment.::::Facilities::::This property comes equipped with top-tier amenities to elevate your daily living. You have the option of covered or open parking, with 24-hour water supply and 100% power backup to ensure peace of mind. The home is safeguarded with a dedicated security guard and CCTV surveillance for your safety and security.::::Locality ::::Situated in a prime location, this builder floor is just a short distance from key landmarks like Bosch Car Service. Within a 1-kilometer radius, you’ll find schools, hospitals, malls, and supermarkets, making it incredibly convenient for both daily needs and leisure activities. Banks and ATMs are also easily accessible. Public transport options are readily available, and with an upcoming metro and railway station just 50 meters away, you’ll enjoy effortless connectivity to the entire city.
